Appearances:
Plaintiff Anwar Shaikh is present.
David G. Mendez representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Sherri Smith is present.
Judith Zubrin Gold representing the defendant.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. JPT, counsel and parties meet privately for settlement discussions.

Case did not settle, trial date remains set.
